raw_text:
```json
{
  "claims": [
    "Sex trafficking and sexual abuse of minors is a persistent issue in California.",
    "The Assembly has played a critical role in passing some of the toughest human trafficking laws in the country.",
    "Last year, the California Legislature made it a felony to traffic a minor.",
    "The California Legislature increased penalties on trafficking and solicitation related to minors.",
    "Human trafficking of a minor is designated as a serious felony in California.",
    "The solicitation of a minor under the age of 16 is a felony in California.",
    "It is a felony to solicit any minor who is a victim of human trafficking in California.",
    "Under California law, it is already a felony to contact a minor with the intent to commit a sexual offense."
```
